title: 3 Reasons Why Williams Companies Is A Better Buy Than Enbridge
text: ENB and WMB are two investment grade midstream businesses that offer attractive dividend yields. Both also offer consistent dividend growth potential along with defensive business models.

title: Why These Energy Stocks Have the Potential to Thrive
text: Natural gas will be an essential fuel to help compensate for renewable energy's intermittency issues. Kinder Morgan's extensive infrastructure gives it the flexibility to deliver natural gas when it's needed.

title: Williams Companies: What More Could You Ask For
text: Williams Companies is a utility-like company with rate regulated gas pipelines and storage facilities. It's demonstrating record operating fundamentals and recent bolt-on acquisitions strengthen the company's future.
